subcodes.title: The Sixth Principle—Means of Existence: Words spoken on 1911-11-14 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Among the most important principles of the Teaching of Baha'o'llah is the equalization of the means of living among men.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مختصر صحبت میدارم از جمله اساس بهاء الله تعدیل معیشت است طبقات ناس
subcodes.subjects: @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @maintainance of degrees in society, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
